items.title: ‘I’m more excited for akka’s match than she is’
items.summary: The World Championship is something all chess players dream about and now, I’ll get to be a part of a match in a small way through my sister, writes R Praggnanandhaa
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: 50 days until World Cup - pick your favourite kits
items.summary: BBC Sport has highlighted some of the most interesting kits which will be seen at this summer's World Cup. Pick your favourites.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Jude Bellingham buys minority stake in Hundred franchise Birmingham Phoenix
items.summary: Real Madrid star and Birmingham City graduate invests approx £1 million in home city club
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
